mapper.insert: /* mcpLogMapper.insertMcpLogTransfer */ INSERT INTO MCP_ACCESS_TRACE@DL_CAN ( PRCS_MDL_IND , PRCS_SBST , TRTM_RSLT_SMST , ACCESS_IP , PARAMETER , ACCESS_URL , USER_ID , EXPNSN_STR_VAL1 , SYS_DT , SYS_RDATE , LOGIN_DIV_CD , LOGIN_SEQ , PLATFORM_CD , MENU_SEQ , URL_SEQ ) SELECT PRCS_MDL_IND , PRCS_SBST , TRTM_RSLT_SMST , ACCESS_IP , PARAMETER , ACCESS_URL , USER_ID , EXPNSN_STR_VAL1 , SYS_DT , SYS_RDATE , LOGIN_DIV_CD , LOGIN_SEQ , PLATFORM_CD , MENU_SEQ , URL_SEQ FROM MCP_ACCESS_TRACE@DL_MCP WHERE SYS_DT LIKE #{trgtYm} || '%'
mapper.delete: /* mcpLogMapper.deleteMcpLogTransfer */ DELETE FROM MCP_ACCESS_TRACE@DL_MCP WHERE SYS_DT LIKE #{trgtYm} || '%'
/* mcpLogMapper.deleteCanMcpLog */ DELETE FROM MCP_ACCESS_TRACE@DL_CAN WHERE SYS_DT LIKE #{trgtYm} || '%'
